title: Turkish Pilaf with Flavorful Pasta
description: A delicious and aromatic Turkish-inspired pilaf dish made with flavorful pasta, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Flavorful Pasta
ingredients.notes: orzo or similar small pasta shape

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add Turkish pilaf spices and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Add flavored pasta and cook according to package instructions.
Add cooked turkey kofta to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro if desired.
